title: [MTR4] 東京臨海高速鉄道70-000形 | TWR 70-000 Series
description: Resource pack that adds TWR 70-000 Series to Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **Tokyo Waterfront Area Rapid Transit 70-000 series** are trains produced by Kawasaki between 1995 and 2004. A total of 86 vehicles are produced for the TWR Rinkai Line, and through services to JR Saikyō and Kawagoe Lines. These trains use the 209 series as the base, as a measure to reduce production and maintenance costs (maintenance of these trains is carried out by JR East). 
6 vehicles are transferred to JR East and reclassified as "209-3100" for Hachikō and Kawagoe Lines as a result of reforming all units to 10-car trains.
These trains are retiring from service gradually and some will be transferred to JR Kyushu to replace the 103 series that are still running on the Chikuhi line.

This resource pack is to add the TWR 70-000 series into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2025.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Tokyo Waterfront Area Rapid Transit.
